ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-26-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-26-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-07-2018 Continued To Feb-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on February 26, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for close of estate has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Continued To Feb-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Mangini for John Lubimir.

Mr. Mangini stated that Mr. Lubimir was just appointed in November, that the last stock was sold in December, that he expects to get the information today and that he expects to file a petition in a couple of weeks. Status on close of estate is continued to February 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-01-2017 Continued To Nov-15-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Mangini for John Lubimir.

Mr. Mangini stated that the property has been sold, that it sold for about $740,000.00, and that they still have the shares in P G & E and $650,000.00 in cash. Mr. Mangini also stated that he inadvertently overlooked box 3g(4)when preparing the petition, that the Minors do live with the parents, that John and Caroline are not family, that they are friends of the Decedent and that he misspelled Caroline's name. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to November 15, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is to file a supplement addressing the above mentioned issues.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Continued To Jan-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Mangini for John Lubimir.

Mr. Mangini stated that his Client passed away in June of 2017, that there is a successor named in the will and that he submitted a petition last night to have the successor appointed. Mr. Mangini also stated that all of the assets except for the PG & E stock were sold and that once the successor is appointed he will do a final account. Status on close of estate is continued to January 10, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
